name: tess-os
description: An orchestration-first agent operating system for Claude Code — a governed organization of specialist agents with an in-place framework upgrade engine.
//: This npm package is intentionally LIGHT — metadata/docs only. The Tess OS runtime (doctrine, agents, commands, hooks, the tessctl engine, and the client template) is NOT shipped through npm; it is delivered via the git template repo and the `npm create tess` wizard (the create-tess package), which scaffolds an instance from a git clone. Do not re-add the runtime tree to `files`.
